registry.label: Defensive fumble-return TD 50+ yards bonus
blockers: DEF and IDP positions excluded from current ingestion scope
registry.notes: Bonus for a defensive fumble return touchdown of 50+ yards; no engine rule implemented.

registry.label: Defensive INT-return TD 50+ yards bonus
registry.notes: Bonus for an interception return touchdown of 50+ yards; no engine rule implemented.

registry.label: 2+ sack game bonus (IDP)
registry.notes: Projection mode uses an explicit low-confidence season approximation emitted by H9.10.

registry.label: Special-teams forced fumble
blockers: DEF and IDP positions excluded from current ingestion scope
registry.notes: Forced fumble credited to a kicking/coverage-unit player; separate from field-player ff. No engine rule implemented.

registry.label: Special-teams fumble recovery
registry.notes: Fumble recovery credited to a kicking/coverage-unit player; no engine rule implemented.

registry.label: FG made 50+ yards
registry.notes: Overlaps fgm_50_59 and fgm_60p; Sleeper leagues use one or the other.

registry.label: Points allowed: shutout (0)
blockers: Requires team-level game aggregate (points allowed per game), not per-player stats
registry.notes: pts_allow is a team-level stat; needs a separate team game-result ingestion pipeline.

registry.label: Sacks
blockers: DEF and IDP positions excluded from current ingestion scope
registry.notes: Rule handles both DEF and IDP positions with the same key; Sleeper registers one entry per position group.

registry.label: Extra points made
blockers: K position excluded from current nflverse weekly ingestion scope
registry.notes: nflverse weekly has kicker stats; data pipeline scope must be extended to K.

registry.label: Yards allowed: 0-100
registry.notes: yds_allow is a team-level stat; needs team game-result ingestion pipeline.

idp.dataRisk: Data exists, but projection quality still depends on role stability and source completeness.
idp.modelRisk: Use conservative baseline with explicit low-confidence flags for volatile events.
idp.scoringRisk: Straight counting stats are scoreable when fields exist.
idp.marketRisk: Current ADP may not cover this category sufficiently.

dst.modelRisk: Use conservative baseline with explicit low-confidence flags for volatile events.
dst.scoringRisk: Allowance tiers and team context require careful weekly semantics.
dst.marketRisk: Current ADP may not cover this category sufficiently.

kicker.dataRisk: Data exists, but projection quality still depends on role stability and source completeness.
kicker.modelRisk: Use conservative baseline with explicit low-confidence flags for volatile events.
kicker.scoringRisk: Straight counting stats are scoreable when fields exist.
kicker.marketRisk: Current ADP may not cover this category sufficiently.

return.dataRisk: Low for War Room because no owned league roster demand was detected.
return.modelRisk: Defer model work unless future leagues require it.
return.marketRisk: No market requirement before War Room MVP.

recommendedSequence: H9.8 prioritize DST/K only if owned roster demand exists; otherwise keep rankings-only safeguards.
H9.9 build missing ingestion for whichever of IDP, DST, or K is roster-required by owned leagues.
H9.10 implement category-specific role foundations and component projections with low-confidence flags.
H9.11 extend market comparison only after ADP/CSV sources include those categories.
H9.12 projection inspection/UI for all categories.
H10 league value and War Room MVP after non-offensive projection gaps are explicitly handled or deferred.
finalRecommendation: Do not implement IDP/DST/K projections until the roster-demand audit is reviewed. Prioritize categories actually rostered by owned leagues; use rankings-only safeguards for unrostered or data-missing categories.
